Operation 'getAssetTransfers' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary and description are too generic and lack critical details for AI agent decision-making. The improved version specifies: (1) what types of assets are included (tokens, NFTs, native assets), (2) supported filtering and pagination capabilities, (3) what data is returned in the response, and (4) use cases. This helps AI agents understand when to invoke this operation and what to expect, improving interpretability for blockchain data queries.

data.current_description: Get historical asset transfers for an address.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve historical asset transfers for an address
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves historical asset transfers (including tokens, NFTs, and native assets) for a specified address. Supports filtering by transfer type, time range, and pagination. Returns a list of transfer objects containing sender, recipient, asset details, transaction hash, and block information. Useful for tracking transaction history and asset movement across blockchain networks.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too generic and lack critical details for AI agent decision-making. The improved version specifies: (1) what types of assets are included (tokens, NFTs, native assets), (2) supported filtering and pagination capabilities, (3) what data is returned in the response, and (4) use cases. This helps AI agents understand when to invoke this operation and what to expect, improving interpretability for blockchain data queries.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed metadata for a specific NFT, including properties such as name, description, image, and attributes. Requires the contract address and token ID as inputs. Returns a metadata object containing all available information about the NFT.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve current owner(s) of an NFT
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the current owner or owners of a specific NFT token. Requires the contract address and token ID as inputs. Returns a list of owner addresses. Useful for determining NFT ownership and detecting multi-signature or shared ownership scenarios.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks detail about inputs and outputs. Enhanced to specify required parameters (contract address and token ID), clarify the response format (list of addresses), and provide context about use cases like detecting shared ownership.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve token balances for an address
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all token balances held by a specific address across supported token standards (ERC-20, etc.). Requires the wallet address as input.
